chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-821 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For non prosecution. ------ 28.08.2025 Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh a/w SIP Shahjahan Buriro, SIP Muzafar Ali and SIP Ali Dost Chandio. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh assisted by Zain-ul-Abideen Abbasi, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. ------ The official respondents, present, file their respective statements, taken on record. Mr. Atta Hussain Qadri, advocate holding brief for Mr. Sohail Ahmed Veesar, counsel for the petitioners, under the instructions submits that he does not wish to press instant petition as grievance of the petitioner has been redressed; other side has no objection. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
